title: BigChadGuys Plus
description: Stardew Valley meets Pokémon! Prepare for a cozy adventure with built-in shaders, multiplayer, quests, recipes, and more!
body:
![BisectHosting Promotional Banner](https://us-east-1.tixte.net/uploads/joe.with-your.mom/lwvgt84cle4.png)
✨ **Need a server?** Choose **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/bigchadguys?r=curseforge)**! ✨ _As a modpack developer, I've used many server providers, but Bisect's servers stand out in terms of quality and support. In an industry where shady practices, elusive support, and refund rejections are common, Bisect takes a different approach. They avoid those pitfalls and prioritize your satisfaction._ 💞 Use code **BIGCHADGUYS** for **25%** off your first month! 💞
![Overview](https://us-east-1.tixte.net/uploads/joe.with-your.mom/BH_BCG_banner1.png)
✨ Think **Stardew Valley** with **Pokémon**! ✨ **[BigChadGuys](https://bigchadguys.com/) Plus** is a comfy and cozy Cobblemon adventure, inspired by the idea of everyday life with Pokémon. Hop into a beautiful world. Explore hundreds of decorations, from typewriters to televisions to toilets. Race your friends in planes, trains, and automobiles. Expand your diet with a huge variety of farming and cooking mods. Sell your crops and mob drops in the **[Selling Bin](https://modrinth.com/mod/selling-bin)**! And buy rare and unique items in the **[Daily Shop](https://modrinth.com/mod/daily-shop)**! **BCG+** follows a progression system like Vanilla **Minecraft**, offering familiarity with exciting new twists.
![Features](https://us-east-1.tixte.net/uploads/joe.with-your.mom/BH_BCG_banner2.png) ✨ **Wecommended Dedotated WAM**: **6GB** to **8GB** for sublime performance! ✨ **Beautiful World Generation**: Powered by **[Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)**. ✨ **Built-in Shaders**: Experience beautiful visuals with custom **[Complementary](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined)**. ✨ **Engaging Quests**: Jump into our comprehensive questing system that challenges you at every turn! ✨ **Single/Multi-Player Economy**: Navigate a unique economy with our custom **[Daily Shop](https://modrinth.com/mod/daily-shop)** and **[Selling Bin](https://modrinth.com/mod/selling-bin)**. Embrace your inner capitalist—build expansive farms to fuel your endless pursuit of knick-knacks and trinkets. ✨ **Planes, Trains, and Automobiles**: Explore an extensive collection of vehicles and travel in style! Never worry about being late again—and hey, now you've got the perfect reason to build that parking lot you've always wanted. ✨ **New Decor Galore**: Dive into a treasure trove of decorations! With hundreds of options, you'll constantly be surprised, thinking, _No way, they have that too?!_ ✨ **Fresh Take on Farming & Cooking**: Get ready to explore an expanded world of culinary adventures! With a vast array of ingredients, the possibilities are endless—from crafting sushi rolls to baking pizzas, even whipping up a bacon sandwich. You'll never tire of cooking up something new! ![Videos](https://us-east-1.tixte.net/uploads/joe.with-your.mom/BH_BCG_banner4.png)
By [**@Duncan**](https://www.youtube.com/@duncan)
 
By [**@nigahiga**](https://www.youtube.com/@ryanhiga)
 
By [**@InTheLittleWood**](https://www.youtube.com/@inthelittlewood)
![Credits](https://us-east-1.tixte.net/uploads/joe.with-your.mom/m13y55879fe.png)
A special thank you to the following authors for allowing redistribution outside of **CurseForge**:
**CicadaBluw** - **[Chimes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chimes)** **Draylar1** - **[Go Fish](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/go-fish)** **MrCrayfish** - **[Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework)** - **[Mighty Mail](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mighty-mail-fabric)** **nicky__21** - **[Create Immersive Aircrafts](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/create-immersive-aircrafts-resource-pack)** **someaddon** - **[Clickable Advancements](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/clickable-advancements)** - **[Connectivity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/connectivity)** - **[Cupboard](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cupboard)** - **[Farsight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farsight-fabric)** - **[Fix GPU Memory Leak](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fix-gpu-memory-leak)** - **[Loot Integrations](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/loot-integrations)** - **[Recipe Essentials](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/recipe-essentials-forge-fabric)** - **[Savage Ender Dragon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/savage-ender-dragon)** - **[Structure Essentials](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structure-essentials-forge-fabric)** **Stardust Labs** - **[Structory](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory)** - **[Structory Towers](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/structory-towers)** [![Join the Discord!](https://us-east-1.tixte.net/uploads/joe.with-your.mom/BH_BCG_banner3.png)](https://discord.gg/B5YQsgSZbR)
